text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Ah, sorry. I lost my composure.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You see, I just received a thank-you<n>letter from a
young girl I once saved<n>from trouble. She says I
was just like a<n>superhero fighting for justice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It began when I heard plaintive whimpers<n>coming
from within a small shed... The<n>door was rusted
and would not open, so<n>I delivered a swift punch!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is so rewarding to see the techniques I<n>trained
so hard prove useful to others. I<n>shall continue to
strive for mastery!
